title: Converting Date Formats
scenario: Write a prompt to convert a date from 'dd/mm/yyyy' to 'mm/dd/yyyy' format. The input date should be a variable (e.g., 'input_date').
constraints: Must convert the date to the specified format

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the generated code is in Python
Check if the date is correctly converted to the specified format
Check if the generated code has correct syntax
